triggers.name: Walking Sleep duration
triggers.comments: Shaman mez (level 13; detrimental, so the generated buff packs skip it). Formula 6 cap 35: 150 s at 50, ~48 s at level 16 — the engine rescales to the profile's level. Moved here from the old default.json starter pack.

triggers.name: Walking Sleep worn off
triggers.pattern: ^Your Walking Sleep spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.
triggers.comments: Matches both the bare form and 'worn off of <target>.'. Walking Sleep is shaman-only per spell data, so it is deliberately absent from the enchanter mez-worn-target alternation (no double-fire for Ench+Shm characters). Also cancels the 'Mez (Walking Sleep)' countdown started by the curated cast timer.

triggers.name: Snails Healing on you
triggers.pattern: ^You being to feel healed by the snail\.$
triggers.comments: Incoming Shaman HoT. Class-agnostic recipient text, including the game's observed 'being' typo; spell formula 10 capped at 4 ticks (24 s).

triggers.comments: Incoming Shaman HoT. Class-agnostic recipient text, including the game's observed 'being' typo; spell formula 10 capped at 4 ticks (24 s).

triggers.name: Animal Healing finished
triggers.comments: Class-agnostic recipient wear-off text for the Shaman animal-healing family. The matched rank is not exposed to actions, so cancelling all four names is safe and prevents stale bars.
